name: Anu the Exarch of Heaven
rules_text: Ruler of the Specular Crown. Anu embodies divine entropy; his attacks reduce enemy initiative by half and permanently lower morale of defeated foes.
initiative_text: When attacking, this unit strikes all opponents simultaneously. Damage dealt ignores guard and cannot be countered. Enemies that fall before him lose 1 morale permanently.
initiative_summary:
Apocalyptic Initiative (13)
🛡️ Guard 7 • ⚔️ First Strike 7
Acts before all others. Attacks strike all foes simultaneously. Reduces enemy morale by 1 permanently.
